description_long: This is a large, tracked military combat vehicle with a prominent rotating turret and a long-barreled main cannon extending from the front. The hull is angular and robust, with thick armor plating covering the entire body, including the turret and lower chassis. The vehicle features six large road wheels on each side, connected by a continuous metal track system for all-terrain mobility. Several hatches, periscopes, and antennae are visible on the turret, indicating crew access and communication capabilities. The exterior is painted in a matte olive green color, with no visible camouflage patterns or military insignia. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility for urban or battlefield environments.
description: A heavily armored, olive green tracked combat vehicle with a large turret and long cannon, featuring six road wheels per side and robust all-around armor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick frontal armor, the main cannon pointing forward, and the symmetrical arrangement of the tracks and wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, the six large road wheels, and the angular turret with visible hatches and antennae.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat back armor, rear hatch, and the end of the track system, with no visible weaponry.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, turret details, and the track system, with some small external fixtures visible.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with thick, angular panels covering the hull and turret; sloped surfaces for deflection; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive green paint scheme; no camouflage pattern visible.
